title: Portfolio views
excerpt:
I am trying to get access to the portfolio views in one of my two accounts. 
On one account, when I hit the plus sign, there’s an option under the “Project Management” gray text to add a “New Project” and “New Portfolio”…

posts.author: hmagee (Harrison Magee)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to get access to the portfolio views in one of my two accounts.

On one account, when I hit the plus sign, there’s an option under the “Project Management” gray text to add a “New Project” and “New Portfolio” to my workspace. On the other account, this does not pop up, the top option is “New Board.”

Both accounts are pro with no additional apps or products installed.

Is this something I can install or is it a beta feature only available to certain users?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Harrison,

The portfolio solution is still currently in gradual release and undergoing some testing. It still isn’t rolled out to all accounts yet but keep your eye out as it’s coming to all pro accounts very soon
